title: osteospermum lanosum
intro: Osteospermum lanosum, also known as the Cape marigold or Dune daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, characterized by its vibrant yellow and orange flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in African and Asian cultures, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. The health benefits of Osteospermum lanosum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Osteospermum lanosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
